source: Robotouille official task JSON transformed into a stateful NS-FSM ground-truth file with guarded branching candidates and judge/fallback validation

tasks.goal_description: Prepare a cheese chicken sandwich on a table

completion_condition: robot is at station containing chicken__3

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Only grounded move actions that make progress toward this target are allowed.
Only grounded move actions that make progress toward this target are allowed.

state_list.name: NAVIGATE_TO_chicken__3_FOR_COOK
notes: This state deliberately branches before picking up the cook target.
If every stove is blocked by another item, clear the stove first.
state_list.phase_goal: Prepare an empty stove, then reach chicken__3 so it can be cooked.

action.constraint: Only grounded move actions that make progress toward this target are allowed.

transitions.condition: A stove is occupied by an item other than chicken__3.

action.constraint: Only grounded move actions that make progress toward this target are allowed.

transitions.condition: At least one stove can accept chicken__3; move to the item.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Pick up any clear item currently sitting on a stove.

state_list.name: PICK_UP_STOVE_BLOCKER_FOR_chicken__3
state_list.phase_goal: Pick up the top item blocking the stove before cooking chicken__3.

completion_condition: robot is at an empty table with stove blocker

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Only grounded move actions that make progress toward this target are allowed.

state_list.name: NAVIGATE_TO_CLEAR_TABLE_WITH_STOVE_BLOCKER_FOR_chicken__3
state_list.phase_goal: Move the stove blocker to an empty table so chicken__3 can be cooked.

completion_condition: stove blocker is no longer on stove

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Place the held blocker on an empty table; item identity is runtime-bound.

state_list.name: PLACE_STOVE_BLOCKER_ON_TABLE_FOR_chicken__3
state_list.phase_goal: Place the stove blocker on a table, then re-check stove readiness for chicken__3.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Hands must be free and the robot must already be at the item's station.

state_list.name: PICK_UP_chicken__3_FOR_COOK
state_list.phase_goal: Pick up chicken__3 for cooking.

completion_condition: robot is at an empty stove with chicken__3

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Only grounded move actions that make progress toward this target are allowed.

state_list.name: NAVIGATE_TO_STOVE_WITH_chicken__3
state_list.phase_goal: Bring chicken__3 to an empty stove.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: The stove must be empty so chicken__3 is directly on the stove, not stacked on another item.

state_list.name: PLACE_chicken__3_ON_STOVE
state_list.phase_goal: Place chicken__3 directly on an empty stove.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Only start cooking once the item is directly on the stove.

state_list.name: START_COOK_chicken__3
state_list.phase_goal: Start cooking chicken__3.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Wait if chicken__3 is the only pending useful subgoal or if cooking is about to finish.
Only switch to another pending subgoal if it does not interrupt cooking chicken__3.

state_list.name: chicken__3_COOKING_BRANCH
notes: This is the canonical asynchronous branch state.
Runtime verifier should forbid removing the item before it is fully cooked.
state_list.phase_goal: Preserve chicken__3's cooking process while making progress on other pending subgoals.

completion_condition: robot is at station containing bread__1

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Hands must be free and the robot must already be at the item's station.
Only grounded move actions that make progress toward this target are allowed.

state_list.name: NAVIGATE_TO_bread__1_FOR_SERVE
state_list.phase_goal: Reach or pick up bread__1 so it can be served to a table.

action.constraint: Hands must be free and the robot must already be at the item's station.

transitions.condition: Robot is already at the station containing bread__1; pick it up.

action.constraint: Only grounded move actions that make progress toward this target are allowed.

transitions.condition: Robot is not at bread__1; navigate to its station.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Hands must be free and the robot must already be at the item's station.

state_list.name: PICK_UP_bread__1_FOR_SERVE
state_list.phase_goal: Pick up bread__1 for serving.

completion_condition: robot is at serving table with bread__1

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Only grounded move actions that make progress toward this target are allowed.

state_list.name: NAVIGATE_TO_TABLE_WITH_bread__1
state_list.phase_goal: Bring bread__1 to a serving table.

fsm_allowed_actions.constraint: Choose the serving table that keeps the dish decomposition reachable and respects any top/clear requirement.

state_list.name: PLACE_bread__1_ON_TABLE
state_list.phase_goal: Serve bread__1 on the target table.
